name: What evidence proves my lawyer used unverified AI in court filings?

mainEntity.name: What evidence proves my lawyer used unverified AI in court filings?

acceptedAnswer.text: Transcripts, fake case dockets, AI logs show unverified use.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Court transcripts questioning citations, AI tool logs, lack of case verification records. Judge Castel flagged fake quotes from ChatGPT in Levidow.[1] Key factors: docket entries, metadata, witness testimony. Subpoena firm devices, demand production. Preserve your case files now.
